hero.title: Need help? We’re here for you.
hero.lead: Our team is dedicated to providing the best possible support. Reach out with any questions or concerns.

form.title: Send us a message
form.note: We typically reply within 1 business day.

live_support.title: Live Support
live_support.greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
live_support.example_user_message: I’m having trouble with my account.

assistant.title: Arohio Assistant
assistant.intro: I’m the Arohio Assistant. Ask me anything about our platform, like WCAG guidance, SEO strategies, or troubleshooting steps.

office.title: Visit Arohio in Bihar
office.description: You’ll find our Arohio Office conveniently located in Bihar (near Patna). Stop by during office hours or book a slot with our team in advance.
